calendar.matters:
Notice On Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aleksandr A. Volkov (415-987-7000) for Plaintiff/ Moving party PAVEL ZINCHIK.
Wayne K. Snodgrass (415-554-4675) for Defendant/ Opposing party SF Rent Stabilization Board.
Sarah Seitz (415-834-1114), CSR # 14175 Court reporter.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: written agreement, deck, services provided, oral agreement, SFRO goes beyond lease, basic fairness, loss of use and damages, ALJ, leagl deck, use never revoked, and illegal deck. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER PAVEL ZINCHIK's Petition For Writ Of Mandate is taken under submission. plaintiff submits porposed order, proposed judgment, and peremptory writ of mandate. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Sarah Seitz (415-834-1114), CSR # 14175 Court reporter. (D501)

Notice On Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-20-2017 Continued To Nov-01-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PAVEL ZINCHIK'S Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate is continued to November 1, 2017 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported (D501)

Notice On Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-12-2017 Continued To Oct-20-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PAVEL ZINCHIK's Notice On Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate is Continued to October 20, 2017 per stipulation and order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
